overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy wading through a shallow snowy river in a mountainous winter landscape, then exiting onto snow-covered terrain. The scene features high-fidelity game engine graphics with detailed water physics, snow deformation, and atmospheric winter lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain river with snow-covered banks

agents.ego_description: Aloy wades steadily through the shallow river water, moving forward through the snowy valley with her bow equipped

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face covered in snow forming the left boundary of the river valley
clear shallow water with visible rocky riverbed and ripple effects around the character's legs
prominent snow-covered rock formation rising from the right side of the river
evergreen trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches lining the river banks
tall water plants growing in the riverbed that the character passes between
faint blue light source visible in the distance, likely a game objective marker or campfire

segments.scene_description: The segment shows Aloy walking through a shallow mountain river in a wide snowy valley. Snow-covered cliffs rise on the left while scattered boulders and a large rock outcrop appear on the right. The water is clear with visible aquatic plants, and snow-laden pine trees line the distant banks under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered river bank and hillside path

events.description: character exits the shallow river water onto the snow-covered bank, transitioning from water to land traversal

agents.ego_description: Aloy steps out of the river onto deep snow and begins walking uphill along a snowy path between rocks and trees

entered.detail: snowy shoreline at the water's edge where the character exits the river
sloping terrain covered in deep snow leading upward into the mountain landscape

segments.scene_description: Aloy exits the river onto a snow-covered bank and continues walking uphill through deep snow. The large rock formation that was distant is now passed closely on the right, while the river and cliff recede behind. The terrain becomes more enclosed with snow-laden pine trees as the character ascends the hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a shallow mountain river into a dense, snow-covered hillside. It begins with Aloy wading through clear water filled with aquatic plants, flanked by towering snow-covered cliffs on the left and scattered boulders on the right. As she moves forward, the camera tracks her exit from the river onto a frozen bank, causing the wide valley and distant pine trees to recede. The scene then shifts as she ascends the terrain, passing closely by a large rock formation while the open waterway is replaced by a more enclosed landscape of deep snow. Finally, the movement leads her further uphill into a thicket of snow-laden pine trees under a heavy overcast sky.
